delivery.section1.title: 1. Delivery Commitment
delivery.section1.text1: is committed to guaranteeing a fast, safe, and reliable delivery service for all containers purchased on our website.
delivery.section1.text2: Our priority is to ensure that every container — shipping, refrigerated, or modified — arrives at its destination in perfect condition, within the agreed timeframe, and according to professional industry standards.
delivery.section2.title: 2. Delivery Areas
delivery.section2.text1: We deliver throughout Italy and, upon request, to certain European countries.
delivery.section2.international_text: For shipments outside Italy or complex shipments, the Customer is invited to contato us in advance:
delivery.section3.title: 3. Delivery Times
delivery.section3.text1: Delivery times vary depending on the type of container, the delivery location, and product availability.
delivery.section3.order_deadline_text: Orders received before 5:00 PM are processed on the same business day.
delivery.section3.international_text: Transport: 5–12 business days, depending on the destination and carrier availability.
delivery.section3.important_text: The indicated times are estimates and do not include public holidays or delays due to logistical causes or force majeure.
delivery.section3.unavailable_text1: In case of unavailability after the order:
delivery.section3.unavailable_text2: the Customer will be notified by email,
delivery.section3.unavailable_option3: receiving an immediate and full refund.
delivery.section4.title: 4. Carriers and Logistics
delivery.section4.text1: We work exclusively with carriers specialized in container and heavy load transport, guaranteeing:
delivery.section4.item2: certified vehicles (cranes, trucks with hoists, industrial trailers),
delivery.section4.item3: compliance with safety regulations and ISO – CSC standards,
delivery.section4.text2: We collaborate with national and international carriers, including:
delivery.section5.title: 5. Delivery Costs
delivery.section5.text1: The indicated costs include specialized transport with a crane for unloading at the agreed location.
delivery.section5.text2: The final transport cost will be displayed before finalizing the purchase.
delivery.section5.text3: For personalized quotes, contato us at:
delivery.section6.title: 6. Order Tracking
delivery.section6.text1: Once the container has been shipped, the Customer will receive an email with:
delivery.section6.text2: The shipment status can be checked:
delivery.section6.item3: on the carrier's website via a dedicated link,
delivery.section6.item4: or by contatoing our Customer Service.
delivery.section7.title: 7. Preparation and Packaging
delivery.section7.item3: prepared with safety measures for transport,
delivery.section7.item4: provided with the necessary documentation (ISO/CSC for shipping containers),
delivery.section7.text2: For refrigerated containers (reefer), the functionality of the refrigeration unit is checked before delivery.
delivery.section8.title: 8. Damaged or Incomplete Product
delivery.section8.text1: If the container arrives damaged or with visible defects:
delivery.section8.item2: Note on the transport document 'damaged goods'
delivery.section8.item3: Refuse delivery (if the damage is severe)
delivery.section8.item4: Immediately send an email with photos to:
delivery.section8.text3: the Customer must report it within 48 hours of delivery.
delivery.section8.text4: We will propose a quick solution:
delivery.section8.item9: or full refund, depending on the case.
delivery.section9.title: 9. Failed or Delayed Delivery
delivery.section9.text1: If the Customer is not present at the time of delivery:
delivery.section9.item1: the carrier will attempt to reschedule;
delivery.section9.item2: in case of return to sender, the new shipment will only be made after payment of additional costs.
delivery.section9.subtitle: Delays of more than 10 days
delivery.section9.text2: If the delivery is delayed by more than 10 business days, the Customer can contato us for immediate verification:
delivery.section10.title: 10. contatos – Shipping Assistance
delivery.section11.title: 11. Compliance with Google Shopping Standards
delivery.section11.text1: This policy fully respects the Google Merchant Center guidelines:
delivery.section11.item1: clear and visible information on delivery times, costs, and areas,
delivery.section11.item3: transparency in case of delays, claims, or returns,
delivery.section11.item4: page accessible from the site footer,

home.testimonials.title: Customer Testimonials
home.testimonials.text1: I bought a used shipping container in excellent condition. Fast and professional service, everything as described. Vegliaia Containers has become my go-to for my future needs.
home.testimonials.text2: The team built a completely customized container home for me. Perfect finishes, excellent insulation, and punctual delivery. I am really satisfied with the result.
home.testimonials.text3: We got a refrigerated container for our agricultural business. It works perfectly and maintains a stable temperature even with large loads. Excellent technical support.
home.testimonials.text4: Impeccable experience. The staff is friendly, competent, and helped me choose the most suitable solution for my needs. The container arrived in excellent condition.

faq.a1:
We accept payments by:

Bank transfer

We do not accept payments via PayPal, checks, or installment payments.
faq.q2: 02. How can I know if a product is in stock?
faq.a2:
If the product is visible on our website, it means it is in stock.
If the item is out of stock, it will be automatically removed from the online catalog.
faq.q3: 03. How can I track my order?
faq.a3:
As soon as your order is shipped, you will receive an email with the tracking number.
You can check the delivery status directly on the transport company's website.
faq.q4: 04. Are your products covered by a warranty?
faq.a4:
Yes. All our products include a 2-year manufacturer's warranty.
The duration may vary depending on the manufacturer.
In case of malfunction during the warranty period, please contato our customer service.
about.title: About Us
about.mission: Our mission is to transform standard containers into smart spaces: homes, offices, warehouses, refrigerated modules, and functional bungalows. With skill and customer focus, we accompany every request with tailored, fast, and professional solutions.
about.mission_text: Our mission is to transform standard containers into smart spaces: homes, offices, warehouses, refrigerated modules, and functional bungalows. With skill and customer focus, we accompany every request with tailored, fast, and professional solutions.
about.innovation_text: At Vegliaia Containers, we believe in innovation as a driver of growth. Thanks to an experienced team, we create modern, resistant, and adaptable modular structures for multiple uses. Each intervention is designed to guarantee safety, comfort, and maximum efficiency.
about.quality_text: Our containers are selected and modified according to high standards, with certified materials and controlled processes. We offer ISO, insulated, refrigerated containers, and housing solutions with careful attention to detail. Quality is our daily commitment.
terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.section1.title: 1. Object
terms.section1.text1: These General Terms and Conditions of Sale (GTC) govern all contractual relationships between
terms.section1.text2: and any natural or legal person (hereinafter the "Customer") who places an order via the site.
terms.section1.text3: By placing an order, the Customer declares that they have read, understood, and unreservedly accepted these GTC in their entirety.
terms.section2.title: 2. Legal Information
terms.section2.activity_text: Sale of shipping containers, refrigerated containers, container homes, and modified containers.
terms.section3.title: 3. Products and Availability
terms.section3.text1: offers a wide range of standard, refrigerated, and modified shipping containers.
terms.section3.text2: Each product is described with the greatest technical precision.
terms.section3.text3: The images are indicative and may differ slightly from the delivered product (aesthetic conditions, color, wear of used containers).
terms.section3.text4: In case of unavailability after the order, the Customer will be informed within 48 business hours and can choose between:
terms.section3.option1: Full refund (within a maximum of 7 business days), or
terms.section4.title: 4. Prices and Payments
terms.section4.text1: All prices indicated on the site are in euros (€) and include applicable VAT, unless otherwise stated.
terms.section4.text2: reserves the right to modify prices at any time. The price applied will always be the one in effect at the time of the order.
terms.section4.payment3: Secure payment systems indicated on the site
terms.section4.text3: All payments are processed via encrypted secure connections (SSL).
terms.section4.text4: The site does not store full credit card numbers.
terms.section5.title: 5. Orders and Validation
terms.section5.text1: An order is considered confirmed only after:
terms.section5.confirmation2: Sending of the order confirmation email to the Customer
terms.section5.text2: may refuse or cancel an order in case of:
terms.section5.refusal3: Obvious errors in price or description
terms.section6.title: 6. Delivery
terms.section6.text2: Costs are clearly indicated before order confirmation, as required by Google Shopping standards.
terms.section6.delay2: Other destinations: according to specific agreements
terms.section6.text4: Once the order is shipped, the Customer will receive an email with the tracking number.
terms.section6.text5: If the Customer cannot be reached, the carrier may schedule another attempt.
terms.section6.text6: An order returned to sender may be re-shipped after payment of new delivery costs.
terms.section6.text7: If the delay exceeds 10 business days, the Customer can contato us for an update or an alternative solution.
terms.section7.title: 7. Right of Withdrawal and Returns
terms.section7.text1: In accordance with the Consumer Code, the consumer Customer may exercise their right of withdrawal within 14 days of delivery.
terms.section7.text2: ⚠️ The right of withdrawal does not apply to:
terms.section7.exception2: Non-standard containers explicitly requested by the Customer
terms.section7.exception3: Used containers with aesthetic conditions previously accepted
terms.section7.condition3: With original documentation and intact seals (if present)
terms.section7.text4: Processed within 7 business days of receiving and verifying the return.
terms.section7.text5: The refund is made using the same payment method as the one used for the purchase.
terms.section8.title: 8. Warranty and Liability
terms.section8.text1: The containers sold by are covered by the legal warranty against defects and non-conformity.
terms.section8.exclusion3: Damage caused by external events (weather, impacts, negligence)
terms.section8.exclusion4: Normal wear and tear of used containers
terms.section8.text3: The Customer accepts the possible presence of aesthetic signs typical of use.
terms.section8.text4: Aesthetic defects do not constitute grounds for return.
terms.section9.title: 9. Customer Service
terms.section9.text1: For inquiries, technical support, or information:
terms.section10.title: 10. Personal Data Protection
terms.section10.text1: The data collected is processed exclusively for commercial, logistical, and administrative purposes.
terms.section10.text2: guarantees compliance with the GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679).
terms.section11.title: 11. Compliance with Google Shopping Standards
terms.section11.point1: Clear information on prices, contatos, return and shipping policy
terms.section11.point5: A privacy and return policy visible in the site footer
terms.section12.title: 12. Applicable Law and Dispute Resolution
terms.section12.text1: These GTC are governed by Italian law.
terms.section12.text2: In case of dispute, the competent court is that of the company's registered office:

privacy.section1.title: 1. Company Identification
privacy.section1.text1: This Privacy Policy applies to the website
privacy.section1.activity_text: Sale of shipping containers, refrigerated containers, container homes, and modified containers in Italy.
privacy.section1.text3: is the Data Controller for the personal data provided by users of the site and guarantees processing in compliance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and current Italian legislation.
privacy.section2.title: 2. Personal Data Collected
privacy.section2.text1: We may collect and process the following categories of data:
privacy.section2.identity_text: first name, last name, company name.
privacy.section2.billing_text: address, postal code, city, VAT number.
privacy.section2.order_text: type of container purchased, quantity, delivery.
privacy.section2.technical_text: IP address, device type, browser, pages visited.
privacy.section2.cookies_text: for functional, analytical, and marketing purposes.
privacy.section2.payment_text: managed by external providers (Stripe, PayPal, etc.).
privacy.section2.payment_note: → We do not store full credit card numbers.
privacy.section3.title: 3. Purposes of Processing
privacy.section3.text1: Personal data is used exclusively for:
privacy.section3.purpose1: Order management (sale and delivery of containers).
privacy.section3.purpose2: Communication with the customer (quotes, confirmations, support).
privacy.section3.purpose3: Legal and fiscal obligations (invoicing, VAT, accounting).
privacy.section3.purpose4: Improving the site and offered services.
privacy.section3.purpose5: Marketing and commercial communications, with prior consent.
privacy.section3.purpose6: IT security and prevention of fraudulent activities.
privacy.section4.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
privacy.section4.text1: Data is processed in accordance with the legal bases provided by the GDPR:
privacy.section4.art6b: performance of a contract or pre-contractual measures.
privacy.section5.title: 5. Recipients of Data
privacy.section5.text1: Personal data may be communicated exclusively to:
privacy.section5.recipient1: Transport and logistics providers (for container delivery).
privacy.section5.recipient3: Tax and accounting advisors, if necessary.
privacy.section5.recipient4: Analytics and marketing providers (e.g., Google Analytics).
privacy.section5.recipient5: Public authorities, if required by law.
privacy.section5.text2: We do not sell or transfer personal data to unauthorized third parties.
privacy.section6.title: 6. International Transfers
privacy.section6.text1: If data is transferred outside the EU, it is done exclusively with:
privacy.section6.condition1: Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) approved by the European Commission;
privacy.section6.condition2: GDPR compliance guarantees from the involved providers.
privacy.section7.title: 7. Data Retention
privacy.section7.text1: Data is kept for the time necessary for the purposes for which it was collected:
privacy.section7.technical_text: according to browser and site settings.
privacy.section7.text2: After these periods, data is deleted or anonymized.
privacy.section8.title: 8. Data Security
privacy.section8.text1: implements adequate technical and organizational measures:
privacy.section9.title: 9. User Rights (Art. 15–22 GDPR)
privacy.section9.right5: withdraw their consent at any time,
privacy.section9.right6: lodge a complaint with the Data Protection Authority.
privacy.section9.text2: Requests and withdrawals can be sent to:
privacy.section10.title: 10. Cookies and Similar Technologies
privacy.section10.cookie3: Marketing and remarketing (Google Ads, Meta Ads)
privacy.section10.text2: By continuing to browse, the user accepts the use of cookies in accordance with the Cookie Policy.
privacy.section11.title: 11. Google Shopping Compliance
privacy.section11.text1: In accordance with Google Merchant Center guidelines, the site guarantees:
privacy.section11.point1: Clear and accessible business information (address, contatos, VAT).
privacy.section11.point2: A Privacy Policy available in the site footer.
privacy.section11.point3: Minimal and proportionate data collection for the purposes.
privacy.section11.point5: Transparency on returns, refunds, and warranties.
privacy.section12.title: 12. Changes to this Policy
privacy.section12.text1: may update this policy at any time.
privacy.section12.text2: The updated version will always be published on this page with the modification date.
privacy.section13.title: 13. Privacy contatos
payment.section1.title: 1 – HOSTING ON A SOLID AND PROFESSIONAL PLATFORM
payment.section1.text1: is hosted on a professional server managed by a specialized company.
payment.section1.text2: The servers are also updated regularly.
payment.section2.title: 2 – USE OF SSL CERTIFICATE TO PROTECT YOUR PERSONAL DATA
payment.section2.text1: uses an SSL certificate to protect the information transmitted between you and the website.
payment.section2.text2: With this certificate, the information is encrypted and cannot be intercepted.
payment.section2.text3: A padlock (or equivalent pictogram) in your browser's address bar indicates this information, as well as the
payment.section3.title: 3 – TOTAL RESPONSIBILITY FOR PAYMENT AND ITS PROCESSING BY THE BANK
payment.section3.subtitle: (CONTROL AND DEBITING OF BANK ACCOUNTS)
payment.section4.title: 4 – PAYMENT BY BANK TRANSFER (IMMEDIATE)
payment.section4.text1: The customer must ensure with their bank that the total amount of the order is credited to the account made available by
payment.section4.text2: and that their name and order number are clearly indicated during the transfer.
payment.section4.text3: Any bank fees charged by the customer's bank are the responsibility of the customer.
refund.section1.title: 1. Customer Satisfaction Commitment
refund.section1.text2: customer satisfaction is an absolute priority.
refund.section1.text3: We are committed to offering a simple, transparent return and refund procedure, compliant with Italian regulations, the Consumer Code, and Google Shopping standards, so that the Customer can shop with confidence.
refund.section2.title: 2. Cases in which a Refund is Provided
refund.section2.text1: In accordance with Legislative Decree 206/2005 – Consumer Code, the consumer Customer has 14 days from delivery to exercise their right of withdrawal, without having to provide a reason.
refund.section2.text2: The refund will be full, provided the container is returned according to the methods indicated in point 3.
refund.section2.text4: The right of withdrawal does not apply to modified, customized, or made-to-order containers.
refund.section2.text5: Beyond the legal period, offers an extended commercial policy of 30 days, valid for:
refund.section2.list1_item2: dissatisfaction not related to product defects
refund.section2.text6: Transport costs are the responsibility of the Customer.
refund.section2.list2_item3: does not correspond to the order placed,
refund.section2.text9: Verification by photos, videos, or technical inspection will be necessary before approval.
refund.section3.title: 3. Conditions for Return Acceptance
refund.section3.text1: For a return to be accepted, the product must be:
refund.section3.list1_item1: intact, without damage or signs of inappropriate use;
refund.section3.list1_item2: returned with all accessories and documentation;
refund.section3.list1_item4: authorized in advance by our Customer Service.
refund.section3.text2: ⚠️ Customized, modified, or made-to-order containers are not refundable, except for proven manufacturing defects.
refund.section4.title: 4. Refund Methods
refund.section4.text1: The refund will be made via the same payment method used for the purchase.
refund.section4.text2: In the case of a bank transfer, it will be necessary to provide the IBAN details.
refund.section4.text3: After receiving and verifying the returned product:
refund.section4.list1_item2: Voluntary return or change of mind:
refund.section4.list1_item2_text: costs are the responsibility of the Customer.
refund.section5.title: 5. Cases where Refund is Refused
refund.section5.text1: reserves the right to refuse a refund in the following cases:
refund.section5.list1_item1: product damaged or with signs of inappropriate use;
refund.section5.list1_item2: container modified or customized on request;
refund.section5.list1_item5: structural alterations compromising safety or integrity;
refund.section5.list1_item6: used containers with aesthetic defects accepted at the time of purchase.
refund.section5.text2: A non-compliant return will be sent back to the Customer without a refund.
refund.section6.title: 6. Return and Refund Procedure
refund.section6.text1: The Customer must send an email to:
refund.section6.text6: After approval, the Customer will receive:
refund.section6.list2_item1: a prepaid return label (only in case of a defect), or
refund.section6.list2_item2: instructions for transport at their own expense.
refund.section6.text8: The shipment must take place within
refund.section6.list3_item1: a technical inspection is carried out;
refund.section6.list3_item2: if compliant, the refund will be processed within
refund.section7.title: 7. International Returns
refund.section7.list1_item2: times and transport costs may vary;
refund.section7.list1_item3: any customs duties or formalities are the responsibility of the Customer.
refund.section8.title: 8. Customer Support
refund.section8.text1: For any questions regarding returns, replacements, or refunds:
refund.section8.text2: We are committed to providing quick responses and a service oriented towards maximum customer satisfaction.
refund.section9.title: 9. Compliance with Google Shopping Standards
refund.section9.text1: This policy complies with Google Merchant Center guidelines and guarantees:
refund.section9.list1_item1: transparent information on return conditions, costs, and times;
refund.section9.list1_item6: a return policy accessible from the site footer.
